<command-args>Let's update the attach cli command for claude for now. Fill in defaults for the metadata so that the attach command works properly for now. Eventually we may want to flag these fields such that we can show they were generated by `attach` from incomplete data. The behavior I'm seeing that needs to be corrected is when I attach a claude session, I just see "checkpoint not found" in the UI.</command-args>
It's the entire.io web app, and yes I see the amendment to the commit with the checkpoint id, but when I push it up, the checkpoint isn't foudn in the entire.io ui

task:
Let's ignore this for now. I want to fix the gemini agent now.
`./entire attach 2496d54f-56dc-4dd5-896d-7ac611a14d6c -a gemini -f
there was no Entire metadata found for session 2496d54f-56dc-4dd5-896d-7ac611a14d6c so it cannot be attached.`

It should assemble as much metadata as possible and use defaults wheere it can't figure it out. The agent should be gemini and ideally it would show as much of the prompting/text/logs as possible.
user_feedback_text:
Let's ignore this for now. I want to fix the gemini agent now.

It should assemble as much metadata as possible and use defaults wheere it can't figure it out. The agent should be gemini and ideally it would show as much of the prompting/text/logs as possible.
